title: Ucchi Pillayar Temple, Rockfort
tagline: Ucchi Pillayar Temple, Rockfort — spiritual town of Tamil Nadu

heroImage.alt: Ucchi Pillayar Temple, Rockfort, Tamil Nadu

overview.short: The Ucchi Pillayar Temple is a 7th-century-CE Hindu temple, one dedicated to Ganesha located a top of Rock Fort, Trichy, Tamil Nadu, India.
overview.description: The Ucchi Pillayar Temple is a 7th-century-CE Hindu temple, one dedicated to Ganesha located a top of Rock Fort, Trichy, Tamil Nadu, India. According to legend, this rock is the place where Ganesha ran from King Vibishana, after establishing the Ranganathaswamy deity in Srirangam.

topPlaces.name: Thayumanaswami Temple, Rockfort
topPlaces.description: The Thayumanavar Temple is a temple situated in the Rockfort complex (Malaikottai மலைக்கோட்டை) in the city of Tiruchirappalli, India. Shiva is worshipped as Thayumanavar, and is represented by the lingam and his consort Parvati is depicted as Mattuvar Kuzhalammai.

topPlaces.name: Tiruchirappalli Rock Fort
topPlaces.description: Tiruchirappalli Rock Fort, locally known as Malaikottai, is a historic fortification and temple complex built on an ancient rock. It is located in the city of Tiruchirappalli, on the banks of river Kaveri, Tamil Nadu, India.

topPlaces.name: Christ Church, Tiruchirappalli
topPlaces.description: Christ Church is the oldest English church in the town of Tiruchirappalli. It is situated to the north of the famous Teppakulam tank.

topPlaces.name: Trichy Teppakulam
topPlaces.description: Teppakulam is a locality near the centre of the Indian city of Tiruchirappalli in Tiruchirappalli district. It is a busy commercial place.

topPlaces.name: Government Museum, Tiruchirappalli
topPlaces.description: The Government Museum, Tiruchirappalli is a heritage centre at Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu.It is situated at Rani Mangammal Mahal in Bharathidasan town, near the super bazaar. The nearest landmark is Rockfort temple.

topPlaces.name: Singarathope
topPlaces.description: Singarathope (சிங்காரத்தோப்பு) is a neighbourhood in the city of Tiruchirappalli in Tamil Nadu, India. It lies between Devathanam and Tharanallur.

topPlaces.name: Chathiram Bus Station, Tiruchirappalli
topPlaces.description: Chathiram Bus Stand, Tiruchirappalli, old name Chinnaiya Pillai Chathiram also popularly known Chathiram Perundu Nilayam or Chathiram Bus Stand, is one of the bus termini of Trichy, other being the Central Bus Stand. The terminus is located in a land of 2.05 acres (0.83 ha) near Chintamani, adjacent to St.

topPlaces.name: Our Lady of Lourdes Church, Tiruchirappalli
topPlaces.description: The Our Lady of Lourdes Church is located in the city of Tiruchirapalli in the state of Tamil Nadu, India. Built in the Gallo-Catholic design, the Church is devoted to Our Lady of Lourdes.

items.note: The Thayumanavar Temple is a temple situated in the Rockfort complex (Malaikottai மலைக்கோட்டை) in the city of Tiruchirappalli, India. Shiva is worshipped as Thayumanavar, and is represented by the lingam and his consort Parvati is depicted as Mattuvar Kuzhalammai.

Tiruchirappalli Rock Fort, locally known as Malaikottai, is a historic fortification and temple complex built on an ancient rock. It is located in the city of Tiruchirappalli, on the banks of river Kaveri, Tamil Nadu, India.
Christ Church is the oldest English church in the town of Tiruchirappalli. It is situated to the north of the famous Teppakulam tank.
Teppakulam is a locality near the centre of the Indian city of Tiruchirappalli in Tiruchirappalli district. It is a busy commercial place.

The Government Museum, Tiruchirappalli is a heritage centre at Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu.It is situated at Rani Mangammal Mahal in Bharathidasan town, near the super bazaar. The nearest landmark is Rockfort temple.
Singarathope (சிங்காரத்தோப்பு) is a neighbourhood in the city of Tiruchirappalli in Tamil Nadu, India. It lies between Devathanam and Tharanallur.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Ucchi Pillayar Temple, Rockfort?
faq.a: The best time to visit Ucchi Pillayar Temple, Rockfort is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Ucchi Pillayar Temple, Rockfort?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Tiruchirappalli International Airport (7 km) and the nearest railway station is Tiruchirappalli Junction (4 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Ucchi Pillayar Temple, Rockfort?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Ucchi Pillayar Temple, Rockfort at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Ucchi Pillayar Temple, Rockfort?
faq.a: Stays in Ucchi Pillayar Temple, Rockfort start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Ucchi Pillayar Temple, Rockfort?
faq.a: The top attractions are Thayumanaswami Temple, Rockfort, Tiruchirappalli Rock Fort, Christ Church, Tiruchirappalli, Trichy Teppakulam, Government Museum, Tiruchirappalli.
